# Unified Cyber Security Framework — RUCU

> An integrated Security Operations Center (SOC) platform from Ruaha Catholic University's Faculty of ICT. Combines system, web, and network defense layers into one real-time threat-detection, response, and reporting workspace.

The platform unifies host-based monitoring (Wazuh), web application firewalling (ModSecurity), and network intrusion detection (Suricata) under a single SIEM dashboard. It includes a Kali-inspired security terminal, automated incident response playbooks, GeoIP threat mapping, vulnerability scanning, and encrypted reporting.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the Unified Cyber Security Framework — architecture, live threat feed, and capability summary.
- [Sign in](/login): Authentication entry point for analysts and administrators.

## Optional

- [Project domain](https://unified-cyber-guard.lovable.app/): Published deployment of the framework.
